note: All rules derived from Texas Family Code §153.312, §153.313, §153.314, §153.315, §153.316, §153.317. No hard-coded assumptions.

under_50.description: Parents reside 50 miles or less apart

50_to_100.description: Parents reside more than 50 but not more than 100 miles apart. Per §153.312, court may order simplified schedule.

over_100.description: Parents reside more than 100 miles apart (§153.313: 'not less than 100 miles')

weekend.description: §153.312(a)(1): Possessory conservator gets 1st/3rd/5th Friday of each month

start.detail: 6pm on the 1st, 3rd, and 5th Friday of each month

thursday.description: §153.312(a)(2): Every Thursday during regular school term
thursday.note: Not overnight — child returned by 8pm same evening

espo.label: Extended Standard Possession Order
espo.description: §153.312 + §153.317(a)(2) election — extended Thursday overnight possession. This is NOT a separate statute; it is the SPO with an election under §153.317.

start.detail: At time school is regularly dismissed on 1st/3rd/5th Friday

end.detail: At time school resumes after the weekend

thursday.description: §153.317(a)(2)(C): Extended — beginning at school dismissal Thu, ending at school resumption Fri

start.detail: Time school is regularly dismissed on Thursday

thursday.note: This is the key difference from SPO — Thursday overnight possession

thanksgiving.description: Possessory conservator in odd years, managing conservator in even years. Period: 6pm the day school dismissed before Thanksgiving to 6pm the following Sunday.

start.detail: 6pm on the day school is dismissed for Thanksgiving

alternation.note: Year is determined by the calendar year in which the Thanksgiving break begins

thanksgiving.note: NOT split — the ENTIRE period belongs to one parent. This is a common misunderstanding.

christmas.description: Christmas possession split at noon on December 28. Odd years: possessory first half. Even years: managing first half.

start.detail: Time school is dismissed for Christmas vacation

end.detail: Day before school resumes after Christmas vacation

alternation.note: Odd year = possessory first half. Year = calendar year when Christmas break begins.

spring_break.description: Possessory conservator gets spring break in even years, managing in odd years. Period: 6pm dismissal to 6pm day before school resumes.

start.detail: Time school is dismissed for spring vacation

holiday_weekend_extended.description: When a weekend possession coincides with a Monday holiday, weekend extends to Monday 6pm. When it coincides with a Friday holiday, weekend extends BACK to Thursday 6pm.

monday_holiday.rule: Weekend possession extends to Monday 6pm (instead of Sunday 6pm)

friday_holiday.rule: Weekend possession begins at Thursday 6pm (extends BACK to Thursday)

holiday_weekend_extended.note: §153.315(b) extension applies when Friday is a holiday. For ESPO, since Thursday already has overnight possession, §153.315(b) means the Thursday possession starts at 6pm (from the normal Thursday start time) when Friday is a holiday.

holidays.note: Parents day (fathers_day, mothers_day) ALWAYS override all other holiday/break provisions, per Frank instruction.

summer.description: Possessory conservator gets 30 consecutive days. If no April 1 written notice, days are July 1-31 (consecutive). Managing conservator gets all remaining summer days.

notice_required.detail: Written notice by April 1 required to specify custom periods
notice_required.periods: not more than 2 periods of at least 7 consecutive days each
notice_required.note: Without notice, default is July 1-30 (30 consecutive days)

remaining_days.label: summer_remainder

start.detail: Day after possessory conservator's period ends

remaining_days.note: ALL days from July 31 (or day after Dad's 30 days) through the day before school resumes belong to managing conservator (Mom)

before_possessory.label: summer_before_possessory
before_possessory.note: Days from school dismissal until Dad's July 1 start also belong to Mom

fathers_day.description: Father gets possession beginning at 6pm on the Friday before Father's Day, ending at 6pm on Father's Day

start.detail: 6pm on the Friday before Father's Day

fathers_day.note: Per Frank instruction: fathers day overrides all other periods including summer break, spring break, christmas, thanksgiving

mothers_day.description: Mother gets possession beginning at 6pm on the Friday before Mother's Day, ending at 6pm on Mother's Day

start.detail: 6pm on the Friday before Mother's Day

mothers_day.condition: Only applies if mother is not already in possession under another provision
mothers_day.note: Per Frank instruction: mothers day overrides all other periods including spring break, christmas, thanksgiving

notes: §153.312 applies to parents who reside 100 miles or less apart
§153.313 applies to parents who reside not less than 100 miles apart (≥100 miles)
ESPO is §153.312 + §153.317 election for extended times, NOT a separate statute
The 50-mile threshold mentioned in many commentaries is from §153.312's '50 miles or less' application — between 50-100 miles the court applies §153.312 with possible modifications
All times are expressed in the child's local time zone
Holidays override weekend and Thursday possession per §153.314
